transcript: Is there really such a thing as a... a Martian?
Could you please dispel a little bit of the information about your baked goods? Please?
Um... if this is a prank, I won't, but if this is serious, yeah, I will.
Sir... sir, I have a valid inquiry about your baked products.
Okay, what did you need to know?
I need a general overview on, uh, what you currently stock, in the breaded... uh, delectable goods, uh... area.
As far as bread... we carry... a lot of bread. And cakes, and cookies.
Wait a minute, let me back up a second. Um... you were implying I was, uh, giving you a prank about breads? Is that what you're saying?
Uh, no, we had probably four ph... prank phone calls before this.
In the whole history of your store? That's pretty good.
Is this... is this funny to you, or somethin'?
No, we're not talking bread... we're talking... you brought up the same thing you talked about last time.
Uh... some kind of... grasshopper mash, for fishin'?
[laughs] Shit... [laughs] Jesus Christ. You guys've been smoking crack, or what?
Hey, lookit, I got... I'm trying to make sausage.
Do you have a pewter loaf?
How about... do you have, uh, any tapes by Ry Cooder?
